writing.task1: Dear Customer Support, my laptop order was marked as delivered and signed for, but it was sent to the wrong address. I have tracking records showing the delivery and a door camera screenshot proving no package arrived at my home. Please review this case and arrange either a replacement or a refund Thank you for your help
writing.task2: I agree that universities should limit reliance on recorded lectures and require more interactive sessions because live interaction helps students stay engaged and think more critically. For example, in-class discussions and group activities often lead to deeper understanding than just watching videos alone. A counter-argument is that recorded lectures give flexibility for students with busy schedules, but interactive sessions provide learning benefits that recordings alone cannot match
writing.task3: App X grew from 42k - 47k DAU, retention improved 34%-38%, and average session length rose 12 - 14 minutes. However, this came with higher ad spend $18k - $22k, meaning growth relied partly on more marketing. App Y also improved, with 39k - 45k DAU, retention 31% - 35%, and sessions 11-13 minutes, but it held ad spend steady at $20k, showing better efficiency in user acquisition
